visual_description: A man, seen from behind, stands in the bed of a white pickup truck. He is wearing a light-colored, long-sleeved shirt and dark pants. The truck is parked in a dry, grassy area in front of a large, light-colored building with a sloped roof. A staircase is visible on the building's exterior. The camera is positioned at a medium distance, capturing the man and the truck in the frame. The audio features an upbeat, electronic pop song with a driving beat and a female vocalist. The music has a modern, energetic feel, creating a sense of movement and anticipation. The lyrics, "beginning to cry... and I and I and I and I and I and I and I and I and I," are sung in a clear, melodic voice, adding to the track's dynamic and slightly emotional atmosphere. The man turns and begins to walk away from the truck, moving towards the building. The camera remains stationary, maintaining its focus on the man and the truck. The man continues walking towards the building, which has an open doorway. The camera angle and position are unchanged. The man is now closer to the building's entrance.
